title: Data Engineer
description: Design and build data pipelines, warehouses, and streaming systems. From SQL fundamentals to cloud data platforms, become the backbone of data-driven organizations.

nodes.title: Python for Data
nodes.description: Python fundamentals with focus on data processing — Pandas, NumPy, and data manipulation.

nodes.title: Advanced SQL
nodes.description: Complex queries, window functions, CTEs, stored procedures, query optimization, and database design.

nodes.title: Database Systems
nodes.description: PostgreSQL, MySQL, and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cassandra). ACID, indexing, partitioning, and replication.

nodes.title: ETL Fundamentals
nodes.description: Extract, Transform, Load patterns — data extraction, cleaning, transformation, and loading into target systems.

nodes.title: Python ETL Tools
nodes.description: Airflow, Prefect, or Dagster for orchestrating data pipelines and workflow management.

nodes.title: Apache Spark
nodes.description: Distributed data processing with PySpark — RDDs, DataFrames, Spark SQL, and optimization.

nodes.title: Stream Processing
nodes.description: Real-time data processing with Apache Kafka, Flink, or Spark Streaming.

nodes.title: Data Warehousing
nodes.description: Data warehouse design — star/snowflake schemas, fact tables, dimensional modeling, and ETL to warehouse.

nodes.title: Cloud Data Platforms
nodes.description: AWS (S3, Redshift, Glue), GCP (BigQuery, Dataflow), or Azure (Synapse, Data Factory).

nodes.title: Workflow Orchestration
nodes.description: Orchestrate complex data workflows with Airflow, Dagster, or Prefect — DAGs, scheduling, monitoring.

nodes.title: Data Quality & Testing
nodes.description: Data validation, schema testing, anomaly detection, and data quality frameworks (Great Expectations, dbt tests).

nodes.title: Data Security & Governance
nodes.description: Data encryption, access control, PII handling, GDPR compliance, and data governance frameworks.

nodes.title: Data Pipeline Performance
nodes.description: Optimize data pipelines — partitioning, caching, parallelism, incremental loading, and cost optimization.

nodes.title: Git & Version Control for Data
nodes.description: Version control data pipelines, dbt projects, and use DVC for data versioning.

nodes.title: Docker for Data Engineering
nodes.description: Containerize data pipelines, run local data stacks with Docker Compose, and container best practices.

nodes.title: Kubernetes for Data
nodes.description: Run data infrastructure on Kubernetes — Spark on K8s, Airflow on K8s, and resource management.

nodes.title: ML Data Pipelines
nodes.description: Build data pipelines for ML — feature stores, data versioning, and MLflow integration.

nodes.title: Data APIs
nodes.description: Build data APIs with FastAPI, GraphQL, or REST — serve data to downstream applications.

nodes.title: Data Pipeline Monitoring
nodes.description: Monitor pipeline health, data freshness, SLA tracking, and alerting for data issues.

nodes.title: NoSQL Deep Dive
nodes.description: Document stores (MongoDB), key-value (Redis), column-family (Cassandra), and graph databases (Neo4j).

nodes.title: Job Scheduling
nodes.description: Cron, Airflow schedules, or cloud schedulers for recurring data jobs and maintenance tasks.

nodes.title: Data Formats & Serialization
nodes.description: JSON, CSV, Parquet, Avro, Protobuf — choosing the right format for storage and transfer.

nodes.title: Data Catalogs & Lineage
nodes.description: Data catalogs (Apache Atlas, DataHub), data lineage tracking, and metadata management.

nodes.title: Cloud Cost Optimization
nodes.description: Optimize cloud data costs — right-sizing, reserved capacity, spot instances, and cost monitoring.
